label: 腰部整面右裙展开撕马面裙v11
choreographyRules: Before the skirt is removed, the character faces away from the audience.
Before removal, the left hand stays on the left waist and the right hand performs the single-hand clockwise tear at the waist.
The skirt opening is on the character front, not on the back, so no back-opening white-trousers reveal is used before removal.
The middle frames include a waist-origin pull-open beat where the whole right side skirt panel expands from the waist.
White wide-leg trousers appear only after the removal beat.
The final frame shows the removed mamian skirt on the ground.
The white-trouser frames are redrawn source frames, not patched or overlaid.
reviewNotes: Regenerated as a complete source sheet after rejecting patched white-trouser frames.
Middle transition frames show the whole right side skirt panel being pulled open from the waist.
White-trouser and ground-skirt frames come from the redrawn source sheet without local compositing.
White-trouser frames are not modified with local trouser overlays.
